Permanently deletes the album from the device.
On Android, it deletes the album and all its assets.
On iOS, it deletes the album but keeps the assets in the main library.

Removes assets from the album without deleting them from the library.

delete it or add it to another album.

Filters assets where the specified field is equal to the given value.

content.text: The updated query object for chaining.

summary.text: The value that the field should equal. Each field has a specific unique type.
Executes the query and retrieves the matching assets.

content.text: A promise that resolves to an array of
objects that match the query criteria.

```ts
const assets = await new Query()
 .eq(AssetField.MEDIA_TYPE, MediaType.IMAGE)
 .lte(AssetField.HEIGHT, 1080)
 .orderBy(AssetField.CREATION_TIME)
 .limit(20)
 .exe();
```
